transcript_preview: 7.12. Klausies, lasi. Man lūdzu kurpes 43. izmēru. Kādā krāsā? Melnā. Cik tās maksā? Tās maksā 30 eiro. Tas ir lēti. Man lūdzu meiteli. Kuru izmēru? Kādu krāsu? Zilu 44. izmēru. Cik tas maksā? Tas maksā 550 eiro. Tas ir dārgi!
translation_preview: Listen, read. I asked for my shoe size 43. What color? Black. How much do they cost? They cost EUR 30. It's cheap. I asked a girl. Which size? What color? Blue size 44. How much does it cost? It costs EUR 550. It's expensive!
